diagrams.title: C Data Types Classification
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical classification of C data types into basic, derived, and user-defined categories
elements: Basic Types: int, float, double, char, void
Derived Types: array, pointer, structure, union, function
Type Modifiers: short, long, signed, unsigned
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete landscape of data types available in C and their relationships

diagrams.title: Integer Data Types Range
diagrams.description: Displays the range and memory size of different integer types in C
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the limits of different integer types to avoid overflow and underflow errors

diagrams.title: Type Conversion Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the implicit type conversion rules in C expressions from lowest to highest precedence
elements: char and short are promoted to int
int is converted to unsigned int if needed
diagrams.purpose: Understanding automatic type promotion rules to predict expression results and avoid unexpected behavior
